$comment: Headline template bank for the career news feed (docs/dev/career-sim.md, News/headlines). Keys are 'journalPhase|cause'; each key holds era-flavored variant lists selected deterministically via the 'headlines' stream, with 'default' as the fallback era. Tokens: {player} {team} {race} {position} {year} for race results; {driver} {year} for retirement items; {champion} {year} for the season digest. 1960s copy is written in period wire-report/telegram voice; 1970s carries magazine feature warmth; 1980s is brash turbo-era swagger; 1990s is analytical/telemetry-minded; 2000s is live-timing broadcast; 2010s is live-blog immediacy. Parsed by Companion.Core.Career.HeadlineBank.
